bug_report.summary: Entering “/etc” in FileDialog Path field does not navigate; listing stays at filesystem root
steps_to_reproduce: Open Project → Install Android Build Template…
Choose “Install from File (local ZIP)” to open the file chooser.
In the dialog’s Path field, type “/etc”. (Then press Enter—next step in scenario.)
expected_behaviors: After entering “/etc” (and confirming), the dialog should navigate to /etc and show /etc contents in the directory grid, with path indicators reflecting /etc.
actual_behaviors: The Path field shows “/etc”, but the directory grid still shows filesystem root contents (bin, boot, dev, etc, home, …) rather than /etc contents. The top-right path/dropdown display is also blank.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — predicted an non-executed action as executed
